craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Cute house in a great neighborhood and centrally located just off McCain Blvd. One car garage is great for storage or use automatic garage opener to park inside. Plenty of off street parking with double wide driveway. Kitchen is open to small sitting room with fireplace. Very large open living room with space for dining room table. Master bedroom is located in back of house with small master bath and shower. Sliding doors open to covered patio. Lots of privacy in back with fenced yard. Renter pays for all utilities and is responsible for upkeep of yard. One year lease is required. Landlord will be responsible for maintenance or repairs of all appliances, plumbing and HVAC. Renter required to change air filters. The house will be pest free but renter is responsible for own pest control.

Renter pays for all utilities and is responsible for upkeep of yard. One year lease is required. Landlord will be responsible for maintenance or repairs of all appliances, plumbing and HVAC. Renter required to change air filters. The house will be pest free but renter is responsible for own pest control.
